panels.title: At-a-glance
panels.description: Live proxy load and health snapshot.

panels.title: RPS
panels.description: Requests per second.

panels.title: TPS
panels.description: Tokens per second (input + output).

panels.title: Active Requests
panels.description: Requests currently in flight.

panels.title: RPM
panels.description: Requests per minute.

panels.title: TPM
panels.description: Tokens per minute (input + output).

panels.title: Models Healthy
panels.description: Deployments in healthy state.

panels.title: Error %
panels.description: Failed requests as % of total.

panels.title: Spend (window)
panels.description: USD spent in selected time range.

panels.title: Latency
panels.description: Streaming, end-to-end, upstream, overhead, and queue latency per model.

panels.title: TTFT by model
panels.description: Time To First Token P95 (seconds) — slow tail per model.

panels.title: TPOT by model
panels.description: Time Per Output Token P95 (seconds) — slow tail per model.

panels.title: End-to-end latency
panels.description: Total request latency P50/P95/P99 (seconds) per model.

panels.title: LLM API latency
panels.description: Upstream LLM API latency P50/P95/P99 (seconds) per model.

panels.title: Proxy overhead
panels.description: LiteLLM processing overhead P95 (seconds). High = proxy bottleneck.

panels.title: Queue wait
panels.description: Queue wait time P95 (seconds). Spikes = deployment saturation.

panels.title: Errors & Health
panels.description: Error rates, status breakdown, cooldowns, deployment health.

panels.title: Error rate by model
panels.description: Failed requests per minute per model.

panels.title: Error status codes
panels.description: Error status code distribution in window.

panels.title: Cooldown events
panels.description: Deployments pulled from rotation per minute.

panels.title: Deployment health
panels.description: Per-model deployment state and counts in window.

panels.title: Throughput & Capacity
panels.description: Request/token rates, traffic distribution, RPM utilization.

panels.title: Total Requests
panels.description: Total requests (success + failure).

panels.title: Successful Requests
panels.description: Total successful responses.

panels.title: Failed Requests
panels.description: Total failed responses.

panels.title: RPM by model
panels.description: Requests per minute per model.

panels.title: TPM by model
panels.description: Tokens per minute per model.

panels.title: Traffic distribution
panels.description: Request share per model in window.

panels.title: RPM utilization vs limit
panels.description: Current RPM as % of MaaS RPM limit. →100% = expect 429s.

panels.title: Tokens
panels.description: Token usage breakdown: input, output, reasoning.

panels.title: Input tokens
panels.description: Input tokens per minute per model.

panels.title: Output tokens
panels.description: Output tokens per minute per model.

panels.title: Reasoning tokens
panels.description: Reasoning (thinking) tokens per minute per model.

panels.title: Cost
panels.description: Spend accumulation and rate per model.

panels.title: Total cost
panels.description: Cumulative USD spent.

panels.title: Cost per model
panels.description: Cumulative USD spend over time per model.

panels.title: Spend rate
panels.description: USD per minute — spot runaway costs in real time.

panels.title: Efficiency
panels.description: Cost efficiency.

panels.title: Cost per 1K tokens
panels.description: USD per 1000 tokens — cost efficiency.
